name: Portland Metro Housing Levy Implementation
core_question: Is the Metro supportive-housing services levy being implemented as voters were told it would be?
subquestions: What is the disbursement rate of collected levy funds to date?
Have any oversight or audit findings been published?
Has city council or county commission proposed reallocating levy funds?
analyst_notes: CITIZEN COGNISANCE companion topic — long-horizon accountability tracking, British spelling per house style applies to published output, not to this internal profile.
